creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
There is something odd happening on your system, check the logs I have from tests here, just before "Staging" step:

cp bin/razor-report blib/script/razor-report
/usr/local/bin/perl5 -MExtUtils::MY -e 'MY->fixin(shift)' -- blib/script/razor-report
cp bin/razor-revoke blib/script/razor-revoke
/usr/local/bin/perl5 -MExtUtils::MY -e 'MY->fixin(shift)' -- blib/script/razor-revoke
cp bin/razor-admin blib/script/razor-admin
/usr/local/bin/perl5 -MExtUtils::MY -e 'MY->fixin(shift)' -- blib/script/razor-admin
cp bin/razor-check blib/script/razor-check
/usr/local/bin/perl5 -MExtUtils::MY -e 'MY->fixin(shift)' -- blib/script/razor-check
cp bin/razor-client blib/script/razor-client
/usr/local/bin/perl5 -MExtUtils::MY -e 'MY->fixin(shift)' -- blib/script/razor-client
Manifying blib/man1/razor-admin.1
Manifying blib/man1/razor-check.1
Manifying blib/man1/razor-revoke.1
Manifying blib/man1/razor-report.1
Manifying blib/man3/Razor2::Syslog.3
Manifying blib/man3/Razor2::Errorhandler.3

Have you tried to reinstall perl?
